creator: ek@purplehat.org
text: ... wait a second. You're talking about the release tag on GH that differs, I believe. It looks like the project maintainer made some changes but didn't bump the version of "Latest." I'll check it out and update the port to reflect the correct commit. If the project owner continues to do this, could cause problems. I'll ask them if there's any possibility they can bump the version when they make changes.
